final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [2:0] count_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count_out <= 3'b0;
        end
        else begin
            count_out <= count_out + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
